title: Anticipation
body: Anticipation is an emotion involving pleasure or anxiety in considering or awaiting an expected event. Anticipatory emotions include fear, anxiety, excitement, hope, and trust. When the anticipated event fails to occur, it results in disappointment (for a positive event) or relief (for a negative one).
